name: Lingarr
description: Automates subtitle translation for Sonarr and Radarr libraries using multiple providers including Google, LibreTranslate, DeepL, OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, DeepSeek, and local AI backends.
author: lingarr-translate

form_fields.label: Integrations > Radarr URL
form_fields.hint: Base URL of your Radarr instance. Leave empty if you only use Sonarr.

form_fields.label: Integrations > Radarr API Key
form_fields.hint: Radarr API key used for syncing movie libraries and webhook lookups.

form_fields.label: Integrations > Sonarr URL
form_fields.hint: Base URL of your Sonarr instance. Leave empty if you only use Radarr.

form_fields.label: Integrations > Sonarr API Key
form_fields.hint: Sonarr API key used for syncing show libraries and webhook lookups.

form_fields.label: Runtime > Max Concurrent Jobs
form_fields.hint: Maximum number of translation workers Lingarr may run in parallel.

form_fields.label: Translation > Service
form_fields.hint: Default translation backend. Google is preselected so Lingarr can start without extra credentials.

form_fields.label: Translation > Source Languages
form_fields.hint: Minified JSON array of source languages. Each item must include name and code.

form_fields.label: Translation > Target Languages
form_fields.hint: Minified JSON array of target languages. Each item must include name and code.

form_fields.label: LibreTranslate > URL
form_fields.hint: Base URL of your LibreTranslate instance. Only needed when the LibreTranslate service is selected.

form_fields.label: LibreTranslate > API Key
form_fields.hint: Optional API key for LibreTranslate if your instance requires authentication.

form_fields.label: OpenAI > API Key
form_fields.hint: OpenAI API key. Only required when the OpenAI service is selected.

form_fields.label: OpenAI > Model
form_fields.hint: OpenAI model identifier used for subtitle translation.

form_fields.label: Anthropic > API Key
form_fields.hint: Anthropic API key. Only required when the Anthropic service is selected.

form_fields.label: Anthropic > Model
form_fields.hint: Anthropic model identifier used for subtitle translation.

form_fields.label: Anthropic > Version
form_fields.hint: Anthropic API version header. Lingarr requires this when Anthropic is selected.

form_fields.label: Local AI > Endpoint
form_fields.hint: OpenAI-compatible endpoint for Ollama, LocalAI, OpenRouter, or another local router.

form_fields.label: Local AI > API Key
form_fields.hint: Optional API key for your local or self-hosted OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

form_fields.label: Local AI > Model
form_fields.hint: Model name exposed by your local or self-hosted OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

form_fields.label: Gemini > API Key
form_fields.hint: Gemini API key. Only required when the Gemini service is selected.

form_fields.label: Gemini > Model
form_fields.hint: Gemini model identifier used for subtitle translation.

form_fields.label: DeepSeek > API Key
form_fields.hint: DeepSeek API key. Only required when the DeepSeek service is selected.

form_fields.label: DeepSeek > Model
form_fields.hint: DeepSeek model identifier used for subtitle translation.

form_fields.label: DeepL > API Key
form_fields.hint: DeepL API key. Only required when the DeepL service is selected.

form_fields.label: Telemetry > Enable Usage Reporting
form_fields.hint: Opt in to Lingarr's anonymous telemetry reporting. Disabled by default.
